scripts.sync-core: git add . && git commit -m "Chore: sync core into main" --no-verify && git push origin CORE && git push origin CORE:main --force
scripts.publish: git add . && git commit -m "feat: optimize product governance and multi-tenant sync" --no-verify && git push origin main && git push origin main:tenant-frufresco --force && git push origin main:CORE --force && git push origin main:core --force && git push origin main:tenant1 --force && git push origin main:liard --force && git push origin main:white-label --force
